intentSynonyms: delete a build hook in netlify
remove a build hook in netlify
trash a build hook in netlify
permanently delete a build hook in netlify
description: Delete a build hook from a Netlify site by its ID. The hook URL will no longer trigger builds. This action cannot be undone.

site_id.description: The site ID the build hook belongs to

hook_id.description: The build hook ID to delete
